TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Wiy-lin.sa-si-pi-yakŚ®ĀŚĽČ¬∑ŤééŚ£ęśĮĒšļě kakiliman Wiy-lin.sa-si-pi-ya "nuingku a kamu:1564 a mihcaan 4abulad 26 a demiad misingli nayi; nuhulam asayku kyu pangangan han tu sa-ung, u ingku kasenengan a sipunu'ay a tademaw u kaliangan tu misakuwahiay, widasa nu tipanay a kanatal u kaliangan ci nida, atu nisulitan nida tu cudad. ya paliwan nida a nisulitan nu kawaw nida pasu nisa kuwahian nisa 38 a nisakacuduan, 154 ku sulit tu si-hang-se hananay, tusa ku tanayu'ay musakamu tu nikaudip atu dadiw. usakuwahinida yadah ku cayay kalecad nu kamu, unisakuwahian nu heni kalakuwit ku nigikian akawaw. nilaculan Sa-si-pi-ya i nayi ya-hun-he-ban-se-te-la-hu lecuhan balaki, sabaw walu ku mihcaan nida sa atu an-ni.hase-wiy mikikung, nuheni tatusa siwawa tatulu; Susana, maleapiyay ha-mu-nay-te atu cu-ti-n. 16 a siki nudikuda katukuh 17 asiki nuayawan sayaway sa 20 amihcaan itawya ci sa-si-pi-ya i lun-tun malinagtu silaheci mikuli, u migikiay cinida u misulitay aca tu sapigiki a cuda, u sapaadih tu sakakaay ku nuheni a kaput, nadikudan sa sumaden ku ngangan nuheni u ku-wang han tu a masakaputay. 1613 a mihcaan , sa-si-pi-ya mahedek t uku kawaw nida taluma i hun-he-ban-se-te-la-hu, tulu a mihcaan mapatay tu cinida. wida ci sa-si-pi-ya nikaudip nida idaw kuni palicid tu kamu inayay sa. wida u kakaydihan nida sa u pilihay,atu nisulitan nida tu canan nika pabaliw ku maudipay nidaay hakiya ani sulitan sa u kakilimen ayda. 1590 a mihcaan katukuh 1613 a mihcaan ci Sa-si-pi-ya nitadasan nida tu telung a ziday. nuayawan nida a sapikuwahi a cuda u pakatawaay naming atu nu naemekan a sapisakuwahi, i 16 a siki nudikudan tu mitesek t uku nalimaan nida u satalakaway tu. mahida sa 1608 a mihcaan u nitadasan nida tu sakadihian a cuda sapisakuwahi, Sa-si-pi-ya u talakaw nida namakay balucu', hina tinaku tu payawan atu paculi tu ada, kyu u matinengay tunu ing a kamu u sakapahay a tinaku. Sadikuday nida a kaudip, malingatu mitadas tu sakadihian sakanamuhan, kyu panganganan tu micidekay a sapisakuwahi, sisa cinida atu taw makakadum tu kuheni. yu nikaudip nu heni, u nisulitan nida tu cuda yadah ku cayay lalecad a patahekal, u tatengaay atu sinteb nu sulit vayay tu katatudung, 1623 a mihcaan, ya pulung nida a kaput idaw kya tatusaay a kaput nida misulit tu idaw kinipatahekal tu "sayaway a cuda", nuyda tusa sa, ayda idaw ku patucek nuni Sa-si-pi-ya a nisulitan singaen naming i tida. Sa-si-pi-ya yu maudip henay pangangan han tu miasipay a tademaw atu misulitay tu sapi sakuwahi, katukuh sa i 19 a siki u ngangan nida katukuh italakaway kikakaan ku nutaw. i 20 a siki katuud tu kumatingay tu ngangan nida i ya-huy-lating a pala tulu a kitidaan, kyu katuud tu kumatinengay cinidaan. yu mahida henay sakaydih han a nikaudip ci Sa-si-pi-ya a nalimaan, nu wi-tu-li-ya a ziday malu kasenegan a tademaw kakasikadan cinida, ci siyaw-pu-na pangangan ci Sa-si-pi-ya u kakasenengan atademaw sa. 20 asiki, u nisulitan nida hina alan nutaw palabaluhayay a sapasubana' sumade miliyaw aca matepa nu heni ku epuc. u nisulita nida katukuh ayda u sakanamuhan, i kitakt a cikiw cayay naming kalecad ku lalangawan atu sapikuwan nu tatudung ami patahekal a tu micuyaku pasubana'. Wiy-lin- Sa-si-pi-ya u wama nida ci yi-han- Sa-si-pi-ya , u matatudungay a tademaw a misiwbayay atu mala giing, u kitidaan se-ni-te-huyl-te, wina sa mali.aten u wawa nu kakitaan. ci Sa-si-pi-ya nayi 1564 a mihcaan lecuhan i hun-he-ban-se-te-la-hu lecuhan, makayni i kiluku, Sa-si-pi-ya itawya a mihcaan 4 abulad 26 ademiad nisinglian, u kamusa u nilecuhan i 4abulad 23 ademiad, sen-ciyaw a demiad. wini a demiad sa u cacayay 18 a siki numisulita a nipatelac, alaw han u maydihay pakaluwaluway. ci Sa-si-pi-ya nayi 1616 a mihcaan 4 abulad 23 a demiad mapatau. u lumanida wawalu kuheni malekaka sakatulu cinida, u sakakaay a tatama a wawa ci nida. .
S.PHON: wij-r~…ĺin.sa-si-pi-jak******* kakir~…ĺiman wij-r~…ĺin.sa-si-pi-ja "nuiŇčku a kamu:**** a mińß ¶aan *abur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad misiŇčr~…ĺi naji; nuńßur~…ĺam asajku kju paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu sa-uŇč, u iŇčku kas…ôn…ôŇčan a sipunu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw u kar~…ĺiaŇčan tu misakuwańßiaj, widasa nu tipanaj a kanatar~…ĺ u kar~…ĺiaŇčan ¶i nida, atu nisur~…ĺitan nida tu ¶udad. ja par~…ĺiwan nida a nisur~…ĺitan nu kawaw nida pasu nisa kuwańßian nisa ** a nisaka ¶uduan, *** ku sur~…ĺit tu si-ńßaŇč-s…ô ńßananaj, tusa ku tanaju Ē~ °aj musakamu tu nikaudip atu dadiw. usakuwańßinida jadańß ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kamu, unisakuwańßian nu ńß…ôni kar~…ĺakuwit ku nigikian akawaw. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan sa-si-pi-ja i naji ja-ńßun-ńß…ô-ban-s…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺa-ńßu r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan bar~…ĺaki, sabaw war~…ĺu ku mińß ¶aan nida sa atu an-ni.ńßas…ô-wij mikikuŇč, nuńß…ôni tatusa siwawa tatur~…ĺu; susana, mar~…ĺ…ôapijaj ńßa-mu-naj-t…ô atu ¶u-ti-n. ** a siki nudikuda katukuńß ** asiki nuajawan sajawaj sa ** amińß ¶aan itawja ¶i sa-si-pi-ja i r~…ĺun-tun mar~…ĺinagtu sir~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mikur~…ĺi, u migikiaj ¶inida u misur~…ĺitaj a ¶a tu sapigiki a ¶uda, u sapaadińß tu sakakaaj ku nuńß…ôni a kaput, nadikudan sa sumad…ôn ku ŇčaŇčan nuńß…ôni u ku-waŇč ńßan tu a masakaputaj. **** a mińß ¶aan , sa-si-pi-ja mańß…ôd…ôk t uku kawaw nida tar~…ĺuma i ńßun-ńß…ô-ban-s…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺa-ńßu, tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan mapataj tu ¶inida. wida ¶i sa-si-pi-ja nikaudip nida idaw kuni par~…ĺi ¶id tu kamu inajaj sa. wida u kakajdińßan nida sa u pir~…ĺińßaj,atu nisur~…ĺitan nida tu ¶anan nika pabar~…ĺiw ku maudipaj nidaaj ńßakija ani sur~…ĺitan sa u kakir~…ĺim…ôn ajda. **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i sa-si-pi-ja nitadasan nida tu t…ôr~…ĺuŇč a zidaj. nuajawan nida a sapikuwańßi a ¶uda u pakatawaaj namiŇč atu nu na…ôm…ôkan a sapisakuwańßi, i ** a siki nudikudan tu mit…ôs…ôk t uku nar~…ĺimaan nida u satar~…ĺakawaj tu. mańßida sa **** a mińß ¶aan u nitadasan nida tu sakadińßian a ¶uda sapisakuwańßi, sa-si-pi-ja u tar~…ĺakaw nida namakaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ńßina tinaku tu pajawan atu pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu ada, kju u matin…ôŇčaj tunu iŇč a kamu u sakapańßaj a tinaku. sadikudaj nida a kaudip, mar~…ĺiŇčatu mitadas tu sakadińßian sakanamuńßan, kju paŇčaŇčanan tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a sapisakuwańßi, sisa ¶inida atu taw makakadum tu kuńß…ôni. ju nikaudip nu ńß…ôni, u nisur~…ĺitan nida tu ¶uda jadańß ku ¶ajaj r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ, u tat…ôŇčaaj atu sint…ôb nu sur~…ĺit *ajaj tu katatuduŇč, **** a mińß ¶aan, ja pur~…ĺuŇč nida a kaput idaw kja tatusaaj a kaput nida misur~…ĺit tu idaw kinipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu "sajawaj a ¶uda", nujda tusa sa, ajda idaw ku patu ¶…ôk nuni sa-si-pi-ja a nisur~…ĺitan siŇča…ôn namiŇč i tida. sa-si-pi-ja ju maudip ńß…ônaj paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu miasipaj a tad…ômaw atu misur~…ĺitaj tu sapi sakuwańßi, katukuńß sa i ** a siki u ŇčaŇčan nida katukuńß itar~…ĺakawaj kikakaan ku nutaw. i ** a siki katuud tu kumatiŇčaj tu ŇčaŇčan nida i ja-ńßuj-r~…ĺatiŇč a par~…ĺa tur~…ĺu a kitidaan, kju katuud tu kumatin…ôŇčaj ¶inidaan. ju mańßida ńß…ônaj sakajdińß ńßan a nikaudip ¶i sa-si-pi-ja a nar~…ĺimaan, nu wi-tu-r~…ĺi-ja a zidaj mar~…ĺu kas…ôn…ôgan a tad…ômaw kakasikadan ¶inida, ¶i sijaw-pu-na paŇčaŇčan ¶i sa-si-pi-ja u kakas…ôn…ôŇčan atad…ômaw sa. ** asiki, u nisur~…ĺitan nida ńßina ar~…ĺan nutaw par~…ĺabar~…ĺuńßajaj a sapasubana Ē~ ° sumad…ô mir~…ĺijaw a ¶a mat…ôpa nu ńß…ôni ku …ôpu ¶. u nisur~…ĺita nida katukuńß ajda u sakanamuńßan, i kitakt a ¶ikiw ¶ajaj namiŇč kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu sapikuwan nu tatuduŇč ami patańß…ôkar~…ĺ a tu mi ¶ujaku pasubana Ē~ °. wij-r~…ĺin- sa-si-pi-ja u wama nida ¶i ji-ńßan- sa-si-pi-ja , u matatuduŇčaj a tad…ômaw a misiwbajaj atu mar~…ĺa giiŇč, u kitidaan s…ô-ni-t…ô-ńßujr~…ĺ-t…ô, wina sa mar~…ĺi.at…ôn u wawa nu kakitaan. ¶i sa-si-pi-ja naji **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ńßun-ńß…ô-ban-s…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺa-ńßu r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, makajni i kir~…ĺuku, sa-si-pi-ja itawja a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad nisiŇčr~…ĺian, u kamusa u nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i *abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad, s…ôn- ¶ijaw a d…ômiad. wini a d…ômiad sa u ¶a ¶ajaj ** a siki numisur~…ĺita a nipat…ôr~…ĺa ¶, ar~…ĺaw ńßan u majdińßaj pakar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwaj. ¶i sa-si-pi-ja naji **** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mapatau. u r~…ĺumanida wawar~…ĺu kuńß…ôni mar~…ĺ…ôkaka sakatur~…ĺu ¶inida, u sakakaaj a tatama a wawa ¶i nida. .
S.FORM: Wiy-lin.sa-si-pi-yakŚ®ĀŚĽČ¬∑ŤééŚ£ęśĮĒšļě kakiliman Wiy-lin.sa-si-pi-ya "nuingku a kamu:1564 a mihcaan 4abulad 26 a demiad misingli nayi; nuhulam asayku kyu pangangan han tu sa-ung, u ingku kasenengan a sipunu'ay a tademaw u kaliangan tu misakuwahiay, widasa nu tipanay a kanatal u kaliangan ci nida, atu nisulitan nida tu cudad. ya paliwan nida a nisulitan nu kawaw nida pasu nisa kuwahian nisa 38 a nisakacuduan, 154 ku sulit tu si-hang-se hananay, tusa ku tanayu'ay musakamu tu nikaudip atu dadiw. usakuwahinida yadah ku cayay kalecad nu kamu, unisakuwahian nu heni kalakuwit ku nigikian akawaw. nilaculan Sa-si-pi-ya i nayi ya-hun-he-ban-se-te-la-hu lecuhan balaki, sabaw walu ku mihcaan nida sa atu an-ni.hase-wiy mikikung, nuheni tatusa siwawa tatulu; Susana, maleapiyay ha-mu-nay-te atu cu-ti-n. 16 a siki nudikuda katukuh 17 asiki nuayawan sayaway sa 20 amihcaan itawya ci sa-si-pi-ya i lun-tun malinagtu silaheci mikuli, u migikiay cinida u misulitay aca tu sapigiki a cuda, u sapaadih tu sakakaay ku nuheni a kaput, nadikudan sa sumaden ku ngangan nuheni u ku-wang han tu a masakaputay. 1613 a mihcaan , sa-si-pi-ya mahedek t uku kawaw nida taluma i hun-he-ban-se-te-la-hu, tulu a mihcaan mapatay tu cinida. wida ci sa-si-pi-ya nikaudip nida idaw kuni palicid tu kamu inayay sa. wida u kakaydihan nida sa u pilihay,atu nisulitan nida tu canan nika pabaliw ku maudipay nidaay hakiya ani sulitan sa u kakilimen ayda. 1590 a mihcaan katukuh 1613 a mihcaan ci Sa-si-pi-ya nitadasan nida tu telung a ziday. nuayawan nida a sapikuwahi a cuda u pakatawaay naming atu nu naemekan a sapisakuwahi, i 16 a siki nudikudan tu mitesek t uku nalimaan nida u satalakaway tu. mahida sa 1608 a mihcaan u nitadasan nida tu sakadihian a cuda sapisakuwahi, Sa-si-pi-ya u talakaw nida namakay balucu', hina tinaku tu payawan atu paculi tu ada, kyu u matinengay tunu ing a kamu u sakapahay a tinaku. Sadikuday nida a kaudip, malingatu mitadas tu sakadihian sakanamuhan, kyu panganganan tu micidekay a sapisakuwahi, sisa cinida atu taw makakadum tu kuheni. yu nikaudip nu heni, u nisulitan nida tu cuda yadah ku cayay lalecad a patahekal, u tatengaay atu sinteb nu sulit vayay tu katatudung, 1623 a mihcaan, ya pulung nida a kaput idaw kya tatusaay a kaput nida misulit tu idaw kinipatahekal tu "sayaway a cuda", nuyda tusa sa, ayda idaw ku patucek nuni Sa-si-pi-ya a nisulitan singaen naming i tida. Sa-si-pi-ya yu maudip henay pangangan han tu miasipay a tademaw atu misulitay tu sapi sakuwahi, katukuh sa i 19 a siki u ngangan nida katukuh italakaway kikakaan ku nutaw. i 20 a siki katuud tu kumatingay tu ngangan nida i ya-huy-lating a pala tulu a kitidaan, kyu katuud tu kumatinengay cinidaan. yu mahida henay sakaydih han a nikaudip ci Sa-si-pi-ya a nalimaan, nu wi-tu-li-ya a ziday malu kasenegan a tademaw kakasikadan cinida, ci siyaw-pu-na pangangan ci Sa-si-pi-ya u kakasenengan atademaw sa. 20 asiki, u nisulitan nida hina alan nutaw palabaluhayay a sapasubana' sumade miliyaw aca matepa nu heni ku epuc. u nisulita nida katukuh ayda u sakanamuhan, i kitakt a cikiw cayay naming kalecad ku lalangawan atu sapikuwan nu tatudung ami patahekal a tu micuyaku pasubana'. Wiy-lin- Sa-si-pi-ya u wama nida ci yi-han- Sa-si-pi-ya , u matatudungay a tademaw a misiwbayay atu mala giing, u kitidaan se-ni-te-huyl-te, wina sa mali.aten u wawa nu kakitaan. ci Sa-si-pi-ya nayi 1564 a mihcaan lecuhan i hun-he-ban-se-te-la-hu lecuhan, makayni i kiluku, Sa-si-pi-ya itawya a mihcaan 4 abulad 26 ademiad nisinglian, u kamusa u nilecuhan i 4abulad 23 ademiad, sen-ciyaw a demiad. wini a demiad sa u cacayay 18 a siki numisulita a nipatelac, alaw han u maydihay pakaluwaluway. ci Sa-si-pi-ya nayi 1616 a mihcaan 4 abulad 23 a demiad mapatau. u lumanida wawalu kuheni malekaka sakatulu cinida, u sakakaay a tatama a wawa ci nida. .

iŇčku kas…ôn…ôŇčan a sipunu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw u kar~…ĺiaŇčan tu misakuwańßiaj, widasa nu tipanaj a kanatar~…ĺ u kar~…ĺiaŇčan ¶i nida, atu nisur~…ĺitan nida tu ¶udad. ja par~…ĺiwan nida a nisur~…ĺitan nu kawaw nida pasu nisa kuwańßian nisa ** a nisaka ¶uduan, *** ku sur~…ĺit tu si-ńßaŇč-s…ô ńßananaj, tusa ku tanaju Ē~ °aj musakamu tu nikaudip atu dadiw. usakuwańßinida jadańß ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kamu, unisakuwańßian nu ńß…ôni kar~…ĺakuwit ku nigikian akawaw. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan sa-si-pi-ja i naji ja-ńßun-ńß…ô-ban-s…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺa-ńßu r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan bar~…ĺaki, sabaw war~…ĺu ku mińß ¶aan nida sa katuud tu kumatin…ôŇčaj ¶inidaan. ju mańßida ńß…ônaj sakajdińß ńßan a nikaudip ¶i sa-si-pi-ja a nar~…ĺimaan, nu wi-tu-r~…ĺi-ja a zidaj mar~…ĺu kas…ôn…ôgan a tad…ômaw kakasikadan ¶inida, ¶i sijaw-pu-na paŇčaŇčan ¶i sa-si-pi-ja u kakas…ôn…ôŇčan atad…ômaw sa. ** asiki, u nisur~…ĺitan nida ńßina ar~…ĺan nutaw par~…ĺabar~…ĺuńßajaj a sapasubana Ē~ ° sumad…ô mir~…ĺijaw a ¶a mat…ôpa nu ńß…ôni ku …ôpu ¶. u nisur~…ĺita nida katukuńß ajda u sakanamuńßan, i kitakt a ¶ikiw ¶ajaj namiŇč kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu sapikuwan nu tatuduŇč ami patańß…ôkar~…ĺ a tu mi ¶ujaku pasubana Ē~ °. wij-r~…ĺin- sa-si-pi-ja u wama nida ¶i ji-ńßan- sa-si-pi-ja , u matatuduŇčaj a tad…ômaw a misiwbajaj atu mar~…ĺa giiŇč, u kitidaan s…ô-ni-t…ô-ńßujr~…ĺ-t…ô, wina sa mar~…ĺi.at…ôn u wawa nu kakitaan. ¶i sa-si-pi-ja naji **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ńßun-ńß…ô-ban-s…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺa-ńßu r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, makajni i kir~…ĺuku, sa-si-pi-ja itawja a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad nisiŇčr~…ĺian, u kamusa u nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i *abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad, s…ôn- ¶ijaw a d…ômiad. wini a d…ômiad sa u ¶a ¶ajaj ** a siki numisur~…ĺita a nipat…ôr~…ĺa ¶, ar~…ĺaw ńßan u majdińßaj pakar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwaj. ¶i sa-si-pi-ja naji **** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mapatau. u r~…ĺumanida wawar~…ĺu kuńß…ôni mar~…ĺ…ôkaka sakatur~…ĺu ¶inida, u sakakaaj a tatama a wawa ¶i nida. .
